rows.description: Mistake in last years Acct the sum having been charged for Drawers on Forlings Fann. Whereas a Cheque was drawn on Gosling Bank for Mr. Sewells divd and now allowed by late Rector Ex.tors
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description is significantly more accurate, fully incorporating the multi-line text (which gpt-5-mini split into two rows, including an extra row 24). Amounts (38 pounds, 1 shilling, 0 pence) also confirmed to match gemini-flash; gpt-5-mini misread shillings as '10' and claimed blank pence.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment by Mr Sewell to the college for the Colenso Memorial Fund, amounting to £100 0s 0d.

rows.description: * The Incumb. Domus (Lowe Bursar) ought to have been £24-13-11d. as of Lego 18.5 but was allowed to him to pay for furniture — in three years. Total £165.9.6 for £1293.15.6 and others occupied for a very short time by Fellows. So that £1000 is to remain for the purchase of New House, and a further sum to be applied for an Installation, or to the general account.
rows.notes: gemini-flash's extraction of this complex final total entry is chosen. It correctly interprets the entire text block (starting with the asterisk) as a single descriptive/total row, including embedded amounts, and accurately identifies the final large amount as 3614 pounds and 1 shilling with blank pence. gpt-5-mini split this into two less accurate total rows with generic descriptions and misread the final amount as '361 4'. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's comprehensive approach and numerical accuracy for the final total.
